description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest Docker image. Add a before_script that logs in to the GitLab Container Registry with the gitlab-ci-token and $CI_JOB_TOKEN, then exports an IMAGE variable set to $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:${CI_COMMIT_TAG:-$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}. Define a single stage named build and a build job that runs in this stage, executing "docker build -t ${IMAGE} ." and then "docker push ${IMAGE}". The pipeline has no caches, artifacts, or rules and pushes the built image to the GitLab Container Registry.
